## Why this skill

## Contract reminder — read before proposing

A merged skill must satisfy the **six-block skill contract**: the five inline
`hse:block:*` blocks (`orchestration`, `deid`, `kb-selection`, `report-output`,
`attribution`) plus the folder-level `evals/` and `branding/company-card.yaml`.
Block text is byte-identical to `template/blocks/*.md` (anti-drift rule).

- [ ] I have read the [`docs/AUTHORING_GUIDE.md`](../../docs/AUTHORING_GUIDE.md)
      and understand the six-block contract.
- [ ] The skill's **Workflow opens with structured intake** (§2.7 — MCQ + free-text,
      one question at a time, echoes facts before analysis; never proceeds on vague input).
- [ ] I understand this skill requires **competent-person HSE-accuracy review**
      before it can be merged.
- [ ] I have read the [`DISCLAIMER.md`](../../DISCLAIMER.md) and the
      [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.

## Anything else

<!-- Sketch of the controls, evidence sources, or KB facets this skill would lean on. -->
